title: Phantom form submissions due to click event propagation
symptom: The form submits unexpectedly when a workflow is triggered by a select element's change action. This occurs every time the select element is clicked.
applies_when: Select element is inside a form
root_cause: The click event on the select element propagates to the form, causing the form to submit automatically. This happens because the workflow is set to trigger on click, which is executed every time the select element is interacted with.
fix_steps: Change the trigger from 'on click' to 'on submit'
agent_instruction: Change the workflow trigger to 'on submit' to prevent phantom submissions.
